# af diff invokes the configured [diff].cmd proxy with {base} and {head} token
# substitution. The --base flag overrides the base ref from state.toml.

env HOME=$WORK/home
mkdir $HOME/.config/af
mkdir $HOME/.local/share/af/v1/sessions/demo
cp config.toml $HOME/.config/af/config.toml
cp state.toml $HOME/.local/share/af/v1/sessions/demo/state.toml

# Default base ref comes from worktree.base_branch in state.toml.
exec af diff demo
stdout 'DIFF base=main head=feat/demo'

# --base overrides the base ref from state.
exec af diff demo --base develop
stdout 'DIFF base=develop head=feat/demo'

-- state.toml --
schema_version = 1

[session]
name = "demo"
status = "active"
created_at = 2026-05-22T10:00:00Z

[worktree]
path = "/tmp"
branch = "feat/demo"
base_branch = "main"

-- config.toml --
schema_version = 1

[diff]
cmd = ["echo", "DIFF", "base={base}", "head={head}"]
